text:
Ava is Liam's sister and the protagonist of Truth, the 14th story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Ava has black eyes, a long face, and straight blonde hair falling below her shoulders. She commonly wears an off-white tunic with a matching maxi skirt in a darker shade. She wears a pair of flats for footwear.
